name: Criminally Drawn
description:
Real cases. Drawn cold.

I'm Jonty. I draw true crime like a crime board someone cleaned up — circle head, charcoal shirt, red name on the chest, zero jump-scare energy. Every video is one full story: a single incident or one serial killer's life, about 25 minutes, from public reporting. Minimal 2D. A few archival photos. No gore graphics. No "trust me bro" bit. Just the facts, in order, until the room goes quiet.

If you like true crime that treats you like an adult and still somehow looks like a stick figure got a documentary budget… you're in the right place.

What you'll find here
• Incidents — one case, start to finish
• Serial Killers — one life, the whole arc

New case when it's ready. Subscribe so you don't miss the next one that shouldn't have happened.

https://www.youtube.com/@criminallydrawn

#truecrime #criminallydrawn #documentary #animatedtruecrime
audience: adult true-crime viewers who want factual, complete case storytelling in animated documentary form — dry humor welcome, gore not
geography: Worldwide cases allowed; prefer famous US cases while the channel is new
